title: Spicy Dutch Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish inspired by Dutch cuisine, featuring a creamy twist.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the onion and bell pepper, and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the mushrooms and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the Dutch Stir Fry Spice Blend and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the cream and soy sauce, and stir until the sauce is heated through.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
